name: io.github.do-droid/busan-essentials
description: Busan public facility data (restrooms, pharmacies, WiFi, AEDs, tourist info, subway timetables) for AI agents helping foreign tourists.

tools.name: find_places
tools.description: Search for public facilities in Busan by type and conditions

tools.name: get_place_detail
tools.description: Get full details of a specific place by its ID

tools.name: find_nearby
tools.description: Find facilities near GPS coordinates, sorted by distance

tools.name: get_subway_timetable
tools.description: Get Busan subway timetable for a specific station

tools.name: submit_feedback
tools.description: Submit feedback about data quality, coverage, or feature requests
